MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Trinity Management Services is present. Represented by Jacky Lopez.
Attorney Daniel Bornstein appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Matthew Carroll is present.
Attorney Richard Roisman representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Paul Renne, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed. The trial date of June -04-2012 is vacated. (501/JPT)
